title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Swiggy Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Swiggy Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Swiggy Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Swiggy Global Group:
Swiggy Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Global Group!
